pages.text: $(l)Flower Shield$() surrounds you in a protective petal barrier that absorbs incoming damage.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 10$(br)$(l)Type:$() Defense$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 30,000 + 15,000/level$(br2)The shield has its own HP pool (base 20 + 5/level). When the shield breaks, it shatters with a glass-break effect. Enhanced by the Rune of Earth catalyst (+30% shield strength).
